title: Furniture Beetle
description: Furniture Beetle is a mod that focuses on adding content for the vanilla game.
body:
![titulo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77d99549bb2cbfc5ad5268f9956c73be774b55f3.png)


**🪑 About 🪑**



Furniture Beetle is a mod that focuses on adding content for the vanilla game.

Find a new Vanilla+ experience with furniture.



![barra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85a9ff15e7a7518b8739f6b6f978710ffad37ac8_0.webp)



**🔧 Future Updates 🔧**



- make the oven functional
- Custom GUIs
- Color variation between furniture
- More vanilla furniture






_Feedback and suggestions are welcome 😊_
